papers_mined.title: Tapa cloth (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Pacific bark-cloth produced from inner mulberry bark; large communal panels with repeating motif grids; small natural defects integrated.

papers_mined.title: NGATU from Tonga — Imprinting Kupesi
papers_mined.note: Kupesi stencils impose a structured repeating motif grid; defects in grid alignment are visible as motif-cell phase deviations from neighborhood pattern.

papers_mined.title: Tongan ngatu (tapa cloth): a visual record (Te Papa)
papers_mined.note: Large communal ngatu panels (ngatu launima); grid of square cells with kupesi motif; defect-stitched edges + patches integrated.

papers_mined.title: Fibers of History: Tongan Tapa Cloths (Bowers Museum)
papers_mined.note: Production: feta'aki (inner bark) layers fused via thumping; kupesi rubbing imprints repeating pattern; localized defects/patches preserved.

papers_mined.title: Topology-Aware Attention Persistent Homology Euler Biases (2605.03163)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: topology-aware attention framework injecting persistent-homology H0-H2 + Euler-characteristic biases into attention logits.

papers_mined.title: Persistent Homology for Structural Defect Detection Transformer 2026
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: persistent homology dissects transformer embedding topology; short-lived unstable topologies → overfitting; long-lived stable topologies → generalization.

papers_mined.title: Persformer: Transformer for Topological Machine Learning (2112.15210)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: transformer that learns directly on persistence-diagram input; defects → topological invariants → attention computation.

papers_mined.title: Exploiting Topology Protein LM Attention Maps Token Classification
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: persistent homology of attention maps used as features for token-level classification; attention-map topology defect detection.
